roles.name: Kahuna of the Kumulipo
roles.description: Keeper of the great chant of creation — designs the over-arching solution from sky to sea.

roles.name: Konohiki of the Ahupua'a
roles.description: Land steward who marshals the people from mountain to reef and keeps the work flowing.

roles.name: Keeper of the Heiau Records
roles.description: Tends the sacred enclosure of fields, layouts, and permission sets.

roles.name: Master Canoe-Builder of Hawaiki
roles.description: Hews Apex and LWC from the koa tree — builds the vessels that carry the platform.

roles.name: High Chief of the Western Isles
roles.description: Ali'i nui over all Salesforce craft — sets the kapu and guides the master builders.

roles.name: Senior Navigator of the Star Paths
roles.description: Reads the swells and constellations of customer needs with practiced wayfinding.

roles.name: Apprentice Wayfinder
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the open ocean under the Navigator's guidance.

roles.name: Bridge-Builder of Mo'okini
roles.description: Architect of the great causeways between Salesforce and the realms of Po and Ao.

roles.name: Senior Reef-Mason
roles.description: Lays the coral stones of API, middleware, and event flows beneath the Bridge-Builder's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Reef-Mason
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the fishhook patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Lapa'au
roles.description: Walks the build with kahuna lapa'au herbs — finds the sickness before it reaches the chief.

roles.name: Herald of the Pu Conch
roles.description: Sounds the great conch shell — leads all marketing craft and lifts the message to the wind.

roles.name: Chanter of the Mele
roles.description: Composer of campaigns — weaves words and rhythm to gather and convert.

roles.name: Hula Performer of the Halau
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the village — content, creative, and the daily dance.

roles.name: Council Scribe of the Lua Pa'u
roles.description: Records what the chiefs ask and what the kahuna promise — translates between Customer and craft.

roles.name: Master Carver of the Ki'i
roles.description: Senior smith of the temple images — cuts the deepest Apex and LWC patterns from sacred wood.

roles.name: Junior Wayfinder of Hokule'a
roles.description: Fresh from the canoe school — assists with discovery, declarative builds, and learning the trade winds.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Pele's Realm — Volcanic Eruption Response System
Maui's Cycle — Hero Adventure Tracking Platform
Marine & Underworld — Po Realm Records System

creator-and-sky-gods.themedRole: High Chief of the Western Isles
Senior Navigator of the Star Paths
Council Scribe of the Lua Pa'u

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.themedRole: High Chief of the Western Isles

maui-trickster-cycle.themedRole: Council Scribe of the Lua Pa'u
High Chief of the Western Isles
Senior Navigator of the Star Paths

marine-and-underworld.themedRole: High Chief of the Western Isles

creator-and-sky-gods.name: Calling of the Kumulipo
creator-and-sky-gods.description: Discovery sign-off — the great creation chant intoned across the heavens.

creator-and-sky-gods.name: Separating Rangi from Papa
creator-and-sky-gods.description: Build kickoff: sky father lifted from earth mother to make space for light.

creator-and-sky-gods.name: Council of the Four Gods
creator-and-sky-gods.description: Mid-project gate: Kane, Ku, Lono, and Kanaloa convene in review.

creator-and-sky-gods.name: Tribute from the Stars
creator-and-sky-gods.description: Phase invoice trigger: star-charts delivered, ho'okupu offered.

creator-and-sky-gods.name: Birth of the Hawaiian Isles
creator-and-sky-gods.description: Go-Live: Wakea and Papa bring forth the islands one by one.

creator-and-sky-gods.name: Hand-off to the Ali'i
creator-and-sky-gods.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the high chiefs.

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.name: Arrival from Kahiki
pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.description: Project kickoff: Pele's canoe lands at the Big Island.

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.name: Digging the Fire Pit
pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.description: Build phase: Halema'uma'u crater excavated for the home fire.

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.name: Truce with Poli'ahu
pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.description: UAT gate: fire and snow agree on the boundary at Mauna Kea.

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.name: Eruption of Kilauea
pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.description: Go-Live: the volcano blooms, lava flows reach the sea.

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.name: Hi'iaka's Hula
pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.description: Hyper-care close: the sister dances the new land into being.

pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.name: Offering to Pele
pele-fire-and-volcano-deities.description: Final invoice: ohelo berries and gin tossed into the crater.

maui-trickster-cycle.name: Snaring the Sun
maui-trickster-cycle.description: Discovery: Maui lassoes La so the days grow long enough for work.

maui-trickster-cycle.name: Forging the Magic Hook
maui-trickster-cycle.description: Build: the jawbone hook of Manaiakalani is bound with sennit.

maui-trickster-cycle.name: Pulling Up the Islands
maui-trickster-cycle.description: Solution review with the brothers — islands hauled from the deep.

maui-trickster-cycle.name: Slaying the Eel Tuna
maui-trickster-cycle.description: Go-Live: Tuna defeated, coconut tree springs from his head.

maui-trickster-cycle.name: Stealing Fire from the Alae
maui-trickster-cycle.description: Project close: fire delivered to all mortals.

maui-trickster-cycle.name: Reckoning at Hina's Hearth
maui-trickster-cycle.description: Final invoice: Maui returns home to Hina with the spoils.

marine-and-underworld.name: Council in the Deep
marine-and-underworld.description: Kickoff council convened by Milu in the underworld court.

marine-and-underworld.name: Casting the Sacred Net
marine-and-underworld.description: Discovery: Ku'ula-kai's net cast for the first catch.

marine-and-underworld.name: Building the Coral Causeway
marine-and-underworld.description: Build: reef stones laid from shore to shark-god's tower.

marine-and-underworld.name: Blessing of Kamohoali'i
marine-and-underworld.description: UAT acceptance: shark god's nod grants safe passage.

marine-and-underworld.name: Crossing the Leina-a-ka'uhane
marine-and-underworld.description: Go-Live + handoff: souls leap from the cliff into Po.

marine-and-underworld.name: Final Tribute to Milu
marine-and-underworld.description: Final invoice from the lord of the dead.

Pele.notes: Travel between craters — Kilauea to Haleakala inspection.

Hi'iaka.notes: Errand to fetch Lohi'au from Kauai.

Hina.notes: Tapa-cloth beating festival on the moon.

Lono.notes: Makahiki season — peace, games, and harvest.

Kanaloa.notes: Deep-sea voyage to inspect octopus garden.
